Bismark was run with Bowtie 2 against the bisulfite genome of /data_center_02/project/SR/zhengyanhua/beaverflow_25_517/inst/pdx/homo_sapiens/ with the specified options: -q --score-min L,0,-0.2 --ignore-quals --no-mixed --no-discordant --dovetail --maxins 500
Option '--directional' specified (default mode): alignments to complementary strands (CTOT, CTOB) were ignored (i.e. not performed)
